caption: Attribute Dictionary
description: The Attribute Dictionary defines schema attributes and includes references to the events and objects in which they are used.
name: dictionary

debug.caption: Debug Information
debug.description: Beta example extension update of debug. Debug information about non-fatal issues with this OCSF event. Each issue is a line in this string array.

rule.caption: Rule
rule.description: Alpha extension version of the rule attribute, shadowing the base schema's rule attribute.

stacktrace.caption: Stack Trace
stacktrace.description: Stack trace. Added by beta extensions.
